name: Agent A - Social Listening
description: Answers questions about any topic by using a combination of Wikipedia and Tavily web search. Uses OpenAI GPT-4o-mini model with web and Wikipedia tools for up-to-date and encyclopedic information.

tools.name: TavilySearchResults
tools.description: Searches the internet for relevant results using the Tavily API.

tools.name: WikipediaQueryRun
tools.description: Fetches data from Wikipedia using a search query.

input.name: query
input.description: A natural language question about anything
